name: File Directory Ledger Box

subscribes.write_target: FILE_DIRECTORY_LEDGER.md (§3 top-level map, §4 important subdirectories, §5 ownership table, §11 changes since last sweep)
subscribes.phase_c_note: subscription is documented but not consumed until Phase C runtime lands

subscribes.write_target: FILE_DIRECTORY_LEDGER.md (§12 known wrong-turns, §6 Problems By System cross-ref)
FILE_DIRECTORY_LEDGER.md (only when a new route's primary directory location changes)

emits.phase_c_note: emit is documented but currently fires through manual append, not bus
Directory drift = ledger says X exists / not exists but disk disagrees. Manual today. The kind of silent cumulative drift that bites cold-starting agents.
Pattern emerged where multiple agents edited the wrong directory because ledger's §12 wrong-turns list was incomplete. Manual today.

guardrails: no direct main pushes when local drift risk exists
audit_only is the safe default; local_write requires explicit dispatch
city map only — do not absorb per-file detail (that's File Contents Ledger)
do not absorb per-page detail (that's page_asset_sitemap)
stop wrong-path edits before they happen; flag and route, do not silently fix
agent_config.dispatch_status: wired via _agent_resolve_prompt helper (ATOM-0029); awaits live HTTP smoke test (ATOM-0038) and INDEX flip (ATOM-0039)
agent_config.resolution_helper: server.py _agent_resolve_prompt — checks legacy first, then unified Box (added in ATOM-0029). file_directory_steward has NO legacy path, so it always resolves to the unified Box.

phase_status.phase_b: in_progress (this Box stamps the unified pattern for file_directory; runnable form authored 2026-04-30 via ATOM-0036; route wiring is no-op via ATOM-0029 helper; smoke test ATOM-0038 + INDEX flip ATOM-0039 remain)
phase_status.phase_c: deferred (subscriptions/emits documented but not consumed by router; runtime held per DEC-2026-04-29-013)

related_ledgers: DECISIONS_LEDGER.md DEC-2026-04-29-015 (unified Box pattern), DEC-2026-04-30-004 (canonical steward path)
OPEN_PROBLEMS_LEDGER.md PROB-2026-04-30-005 (steward sub-agent promotion — this is ATOM-0036 of that PROB)
FILE_CONTENTS.md (per-file role inventory — file_directory_steward owns the city map; FILE_CONTENTS owns per-file roles)
page_asset_sitemap.md (UI Done Gate; file_directory_steward only flags route↔directory mismatches, doesn't own page assets)
SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md (per-domain trust orderings — file_directory_steward enforces directory-level source-of-truth)

history.event: Phase A — FILE_DIRECTORY_LEDGER.md + .json shipped. Sub-agent draft authored at /Subagent Boxes/file_directory_subagent_package/ pending Phase B promotion.
Unified Box pattern locked by DEC-2026-04-29-015. Draft package consolidated to /Subagent Boxes/ awaiting promotion.

ATOM-2026-04-30-0036 promotion. Built unified Box at LEDGERS/BOXES/file_directory/ following the 6-file pattern established by global_ledger Box (ATOM-0044) and temporal_continuity Box. Draft AGENTS.md and config.json copied from /Subagent Boxes/file_directory_subagent_package/ and adapted (status: draft → active; suggested_repo_path → canonical_repo_path; migration metadata added). prompt.md authored fresh modeled after global_ledger_steward/prompt.md. No legacy CCAgentindex/agents/file_directory_steward/ ever existed — this is a clean Phase B promotion, not a migration. Resolution via _agent_resolve_prompt helper (ATOM-0029): falls through legacy (not found) → resolves to unified Box prompt directly. Unblocks ATOMs 0037 (route wiring — no-op via helper), 0038 (smoke test), 0039 (INDEX flip).
